options.label: A
options.text: A type of light energy that travels through space

options.label: B
options.text: A mechanical wave produced by vibrating objects that travels through a medium

options.label: C
options.text: An invisible force that pushes objects around

options.label: D
options.text: A type of heat energy released from hot objects

explanation: Sound is created when objects vibrate and send waves through materials like air, water, or solids. We hear sound when these vibrations reach our ears.
